economic_notes: Band operates multiple business enterprises including logging, construction, forest products, community forest partnerships, and fuel/food retail. Duz Cho group of companies active in logging and construction. Three Feathers and McLeod Lake Mackenzie Community Forest partnerships also operational.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Large one-time debt forgiveness of $11,972,365 between Band-owned entities significantly boosted revenue. Transfer to trust of $1,808,810 (2020: $11,765,708) per Treaty 8 Trust Agreement. Band uses modified equity method for multiple business partnerships including Duz Cho Logging LP, Duz Cho Construction LP, Three Feathers LP, and McLeod Lake Mackenzie Community Forest LP. Duz Cho Forest Products LP is fully consolidated as it is not self-sustaining. Some investees have different year-ends and some are unaudited. Net financial assets of $53,750,907 up significantly from $29,069,743 due to large annual surplus. Auditor office located in Prince George, BC — firm name not explicitly stated but formatting and location consistent with BDO Canada LLP. tangible_capital_assets net book value not extractable from provided text. expenses_salaries_total not separately disclosed in provided text.
